title: The Graves of Edgar Allan Poe & The Women Who Haunted Him
original_title: The Graves of Edgar Allan Poe and the Women Who Haunted Him
overview: Hollywood Graveyard host Arthur Dark takes a journey into madness and mournful memory through the mind of Edgar Allan Poe, while visiting his gravesite.
